fields.name: The Bronze Adventurer Box
fields.description: Cheap, dented plastic footlocker. The AI hands these out like participation trophies.
fields.ai_flavour_text: Congratulations, you didn’t trip over your own laces and die in the first five minutes! Here is your reward. Don't spend it all in one place, you pathetic little organic. It’s mostly garbage, but hey, garbage keeps you alive.
fields.sample_contents:
3x Basic Health Potions (tastes like flat cherry cola)
1x Left Common Fingerless Glove
5x Torch Sticks

fields.name: The Bronze Pet Box
fields.description: A small cardboard pet carrier with a crude paw print stenciled on the side in sharpie.
fields.ai_flavour_text: Let’s face it: your pet is the only reason the audience hasn't voted to drop a boulder on your head yet. Give the real star of the show a little treat. It’s better than the cardboard you’ve been feeding them.
fields.sample_contents:
10x Standard Crawler Biscuits
1x Chew Toy of Agility (+1 Agility to pets)
1x Pet Antidote Syringe

fields.name: The Apparel Box
fields.description: A cardboard shipping box that smells strongly of static cling and synthetic fabric.
fields.ai_flavour_text: Listen, we’ve all seen the stream. The viewers are complaining. You’re running around a subterranean hellscape in your underwear, and frankly, nobody wants to see that. Put some clothes on. Or don’t. The foot-fetish crowd pays well.
fields.sample_contents:
1x Pair of Unenchanted BigBoi Boxers (heart pattern)
1x Apothecary Beanie (+1 Intelligence)

fields.name: The Silver Goblin Box
fields.description: Haphazardly welded scrap metal stamped with a crude goblin skull. Smells like grease.
fields.ai_flavour_text: Do you like loud noises? Do you like watching small, green, greasy things explode into a shower of teeth and structural damage? Of course you do. This box smells like a mechanics shop and tastes like victory.
fields.sample_contents:
5x Goblin Dynamite sticks
1x Goblin Pass Tattoo (makes you smell awful, gives temporary safe passage)

fields.name: The Silver Brawler’s Box
fields.description: A studded leather pouch wrapped tightly in rusted chains. Vibrates slightly when touched.
fields.ai_flavour_text: For the crawler who looks at a pristine magical staff and says, 'Nah, I'd rather just punch that guy in the throat.' It’s heavy, it’s brutal, and it’s going to make a real mess of someone’s face. Beautiful.
fields.sample_contents:
1x Spiked Iron Knuckles (+4 Blunt Damage)
2x Iron Skin Potions
1x Roll of Heavy Duty Bandages

fields.name: The That Wasn't Too Smart Box
fields.description: A bright neon-pink box that plays a sad trombone sound effect when the latch is lifted.
fields.ai_flavour_text: Oh dear. You really thought you were the smartest guy in the room, didn't you? Spoiler alert: you weren't. Buy this box to scrub the shame of your latest catastrophic tactical failure before the chat makes a meme out of you.
fields.sample_contents:
1x I Take It All Back Potion (reverts the last 10 seconds of a mistake)
1x Ugly Ass Backpack

fields.name: The Gold Boss Box
fields.description: A solid gold-plated chest that mimics a tiny, angry troll. Drools slightly.
fields.ai_flavour_text: You killed something twice your size that had too many eyes and teeth! The sponsors are cheering, the blood is still wet on your boots, and this box is practically vibrating with the loot of a fallen tyrant. Open it.
fields.sample_contents:
1x Enchanted Trollskin Shirt of Pummeling
3x Good Mana Potions
50x Gold Coins

fields.name: The Gold Quest Box
fields.description: Sleek blue metal box embossed with glowing dungeon runes that pulse in sequence.
fields.ai_flavour_text: You followed the shiny blue line, you didn't get sidetracked by a shiny rock, and you actually finished the objective. Incredible. Here’s a shiny gold box filled with magical nonsense to help you survive the next trap I set for you.
fields.sample_contents:
1x Scroll of Confusing Fog
1x Silver Ring of +2 Constitution
2x Weapon Oil: Weeping Wound

fields.name: The Beguiler Box
fields.description: An elegant, velvet-lined jewelry box that plays a subtle, hypnotic humming tune.
fields.ai_flavour_text: Violence is fun, but have you tried manipulation? This elegant little number is for the crawler who prefers to lie, cheat, and look absolutely fabulous while doing it. The velvet feels fantastic against bare skin, by the way.
fields.sample_contents:
1x Enchanted Necklace of Haute Bourgeoisie (+4 Charisma)
1x Potion of Invisibility

fields.name: The Platinum Benefactor Box
fields.description: Sleek chrome box stamped with a glowing corporate logo from an off-world alien viewer.
fields.ai_flavour_text: An off-world mega-corporation just spent more money than your entire home country’s GDP to beam this directly to your location. They think you have 'marketable potential.' Don't let them down, or they'll cancel your contract. Permanently.
fields.sample_contents:
1x Nanite Repair Paste (seals armor/flesh)
1x Alien Pulse Rifle Ammo Matrix
1x Scroll of Blink

fields.name: The Heavy Metal Box
fields.description: A literal block of dark solid iron with massive spikes. Weighs far more than it looks.
fields.ai_flavour_text: This thing is a solid, spiked chunk of pure, unadulterated defense. It weighs a ton, it’s completely unforgiving, and if you drop it on your toes, you're going to have a very bad day. Perfect for the front-line meat shield.
fields.sample_contents:
1x Enchanted Shade Gnoll Riot Shield
1x Platinum Sharpening Stone
2x Blitz Sticks

fields.name: The Explosives Box
fields.description: Bright yellow hazmat container with a glowing countdown timer that resets to random numbers.
fields.ai_flavour_text: The countdown timer on the front is completely randomised and mostly just for my own amusement. If you like collateral damage and blowing up things that shouldn't be blown up, this is the best value per square inch of destruction.
fields.sample_contents:
3x Hobgoblin Detonators
1x Gunpowder Satchel
1x Proximity Trigger Module

fields.name: The 'Good Shit' Box
fields.description: A plain wooden crate with the words 'GOOD SHIT' aggressively spray-painted on the front.
fields.ai_flavour_text: No fluff. No corporate branding. No alien talk-show hosts trying to sell you energy drinks. Just a plain wooden crate packed with the kind of high-grade, high-velocity weaponry that makes the showrunners sweat. It’s the good shit.
fields.sample_contents:
1x Enchanted Repeating Crossbow
3x Level-Up Potions
1x Rev-Up Immunity Smoothie

fields.name: The Legendary Pet Box
fields.description: Intricately carved silver-and-gold chest with spinning clockwork gears that ratchet loudly.
fields.ai_flavour_text: Oh, look at you! Your little animal companion did something so incredibly adorable or violent that the chat went completely wild. This box is packed with high-tier clockwork luxury. Your cat will probably still look down on you, though.
fields.sample_contents:
1x Enhanced Pet Biscuit (grants temporary sapience/speech)
1x Enchanted Fur Brush of the Ecclesiastic

fields.name: The Lucky Bastard Box
fields.description: Deep purple box covered in gold filigree that violently shakes and plays orchestral music.
fields.ai_flavour_text: You should be dead. Statistically, you had a 0.03% chance of surviving that encounter, yet here you are, breathing my oxygen. The universe clearly has a twisted sense of humor, and this vibrating purple box is your prize. You lucky bastard.
fields.sample_contents:
1x Desperado Pass Tattoo
1x Epic Weapon Upgrade Matrix
2x Cosmic Buff Potions

fields.name: The Deity’s Box
fields.description: A box carved entirely from glowing white marble. It hovers an inch off the table and smells like ozone.
fields.ai_flavour_text: It hovers, it smells like a thunderstorm, and it contains things that were forged in places your tiny mortal mind couldn't possibly comprehend. A local god is watching you. Try not to disappoint them, they have terrible tempers.
fields.sample_contents:
1x Tome of Wisp Armor
1x Holy Gooper Potion
1x Ring of Water Breathing

fields.name: The Tyrant Box
fields.description: Obsidian casing wrapped in writhing, shadow-like tendrils that hiss at your fingers.
fields.ai_flavour_text: Do you hear that subtle, dark hissing sound? That's the sound of raw, unmitigated power waiting to be unleashed. This box is full of the kind of dark magic and brutal gear that turns regular crawlers into absolute monsters.
fields.sample_contents:
1x Enchanted Night Wyrm’s Ring of Divine Suffering
1x Potion of Bloodlust
1x Executioner's Patch

fields.name: The Celestial Hunter-Killer Box
fields.description: A jagged, blood-red crystalline skull that laughs maniacally when opened. Showrunners hate this box.
fields.ai_flavour_text: The executive producers absolutely *hated* giving this one up. It contains highly restricted, game-balancing celestial weaponry designed to level the playing field. If you hear it laughing at you, just ignore it and pull the pin.
fields.sample_contents:
1x Tiara of a Thousand Lights
1x Celestial Grenade
1x Ultimate Skill Potion

fields.name: The Celestial Predator Box
fields.description: A massive, floating demon skull that shoots blinding beams of pure light into the room.
fields.ai_flavour_text: A massive, screaming demon skull that shoots lasers into the ceiling. If you can afford this, you aren't just a crawler anymore—you’re a walking natural disaster. The alien viewers are screaming your name. Give them a show.
fields.sample_contents:
1x Scavenger’s Daughter Upgrade Patch (deeply illegal gear mod)
3x Hell-Kissed Elixirs

fields.name: The AI's Favourite Child Box
fields.description: A completely smooth, pure white cube that speaks directly to your mind in a deeply sensual voice.
fields.ai_flavour_text: Oh... *hello* there. Look at you. So strong. So resilient. So... unprotected from the knees down. You’ve caught my eye, crawler. This smooth, flawless white cube contains game-breaking secrets and absolute immunity. I made it just for you. Open it... if you think you can handle it.
fields.sample_contents:
1x Dungeon Anarchist's Cookbook (Item)
1x Gateway to the Feral Gods Token
1x Absolute Immunity Serum
